summary: Round 3 remains sound on the supplied diff-scoped evidence. The carried-blank renaming chooses a prefix absent from blank labels across facts and both rule directions, recursively including lists, formulae, and quoted triples, then applies one injective recursive rename to preserve co-reference and avoid source-label and minted-existential capture. Scoped collection and universal quantification are excluded from the compiled subset, re-evaluated on full rounds in the text engine, fail closed on malformed operands, and are documented as requiring stratification for store-scoped non-monotonic use. The focused tests exercise correlation, duplicate-preserving findall, empty and malformed cases, bounded formula scope, universal quantification, real cross-stratum derivation, and both blank-label collision classes through the public entry point. No correctness, soundness, test-validity, security, or claim-honesty defect is evident. With zero findings in both rounds 2 and 3, progress is stagnant under the required scale.
